maturityScale.1: Stub / placeholder — UI shell exists but no functional logic
maturityScale.2: Partial — core logic exists but incomplete flows or missing edge cases
maturityScale.3: Implemented — feature complete but no automated tests
maturityScale.4: Tested (partial) — has some unit or E2E coverage but gaps remain
maturityScale.5: Battle-tested — comprehensive unit + E2E tests, production-ready

features.name: Table Open / Close
features.description: Open table → create order → occupy table; close table → reset to available. Includes race condition guards and server-side duplicate-occupancy prevention.
features.notes: Server-side write guards + offline fallback tested

features.name: Dine-In Order Creation
features.description: Create order linked to table with pax count, package selection, and child/free pax tracking.
features.notes: Full lifecycle tested: open → items → payment → close

features.name: Takeout Order Lifecycle
features.description: Walk-in takeout orders with status progression: new → preparing → ready → picked_up. Sequential numbering (#TO01, #TO02).
features.notes: Code complete but no dedicated E2E for takeout status progression

features.name: Add Items to Order
features.description: Tabbed menu (packages, dishes, drinks), pending item staging, package breakdown display, quantity/weight input.
features.notes: Weight-based pricing, FREE tags, and refill items all tested

features.name: Remove / Void Item
features.description: Grace period (30 sec) for no-PIN removal; after grace period requires manager PIN + reason. Stock auto-restored on void.
features.notes: PIN gate + stock restoration verified in E2E

features.name: Void Entire Order
features.description: Cancel entire order with reason (mistake/walkout/write_off), restore all stock, close table. Manager PIN required.
features.notes: Tested with mistake reason; walkout/write_off reasons untested

features.name: Cash Payment Checkout
features.description: Numpad entry, preset amounts (₱500/1000/2000), exact change button, change calculation.
features.notes: Exact cash + custom tendered with change both tested

features.name: E-Wallet Payment (GCash / Maya)
features.description: GCash and Maya payment methods with optional pending_payment hold state for e-wallet confirmation.
features.notes: Hold → confirm → paid flow tested

features.name: Card Payment (Visa / Mastercard)
features.description: Credit/debit card payment recording.
features.notes: Basic card payment tested; split-tender (card + cash) not tested

features.name: Equal Split Bill
features.description: Divide total evenly across N guests with remainder distribution to first guests.
features.notes: Remainder distribution logic unit tested + E2E 2-way split tested

features.name: Item-Based Split Bill
features.description: Assign individual items to guest sub-bills with pro-rata discount/VAT allocation.
features.notes: Code complete; no test coverage for item-level split

features.name: Senior Citizen Discount (20%)
features.description: BIR-compliant 20% discount on VAT-exempt base (÷1.12). Pro-rata for partial pax (e.g., 1 SC out of 4).
features.notes: BIR centavo precision tested across 44 unit test scenarios

features.name: PWD Discount (20%)
features.description: 20% discount on VAT-exempt base, same calculation as SC. Cannot double-count with SC on same pax.
features.notes: Anti-double-counting tested in both unit and E2E

features.name: Promo Discount (100%)
features.description: Full comp discount, no VAT. Business-level override.
features.notes: Unit tested; E2E covers basic flow but limited edge cases

features.name: Comp / Service Recovery Discount
features.description: Complimentary or service recovery discount (100% off). Separate reason tracking.
features.notes: Basic coverage; detailed reason tracking not deeply tested

features.name: Child Pax Pricing
features.description: Children (ages 6–9) charged reduced package rate. Infants (under 5) free. Receipt shows adult × price + child × childPrice.
features.notes: Receipt accuracy verified with dedicated E2E

features.name: Leftover Penalty
features.description: ₱50 per 100g unconsumed meat. Weight input via numpad or Bluetooth scale. Manager PIN to waive.
features.notes: Bracket calculation (ceil to 100g) unit tested

features.name: Table Transfer
features.description: Move order to different table. Atomic server operation with offline fallback. Updates table, order, and KDS ticket.
features.notes: Server-side atomic transfer + conflict detection tested

features.name: Table Merge
features.description: Combine two occupied tables. Package conflict warning. Secondary table closed after merge.
features.notes: Basic merge tested; package conflict edge cases may have gaps

features.name: Package Change (Upgrade / Downgrade)
features.description: Swap package mid-meal. Upgrade = no PIN; downgrade = manager PIN. Price delta × pax recalculated.
features.notes: Upgrade tested; downgrade with PIN not specifically tested

features.name: Pax Count Change
features.description: Increase/decrease guest count. Package quantity and total recalculated. Manager PIN required.
features.notes: 2→4 pax change tested with recalc verification

features.name: Refill Request Workflow
features.description: One-tap refill for meat/sides. FREE tag, REFILL notes. Service requests (extra tong, scissors) go to KDS only.
features.notes: Basic refill flow tested; service request E2E limited

features.name: BIR-Compliant Receipt
features.description: Receipt with branch info, items, package breakdown, child pricing, discount summary, VAT, total, payment method, change.
features.notes: Multiple receipt scenarios tested including SC/PWD line items

features.name: Order History & Reprint
features.description: View paid/cancelled orders. Filter by date or status. Reprint receipt.
features.notes: List + filter tested; reprint trigger not verified

features.name: Shift Management (Cash Float)
features.description: Open shift with float amount, close shift with actual cash count. Per-location, per-cashier.
features.notes: Auto-opens with ₱0 float; no dedicated test for shift open/close cycle

features.name: Payment Method Correction
features.description: Re-key payment method on closed orders. Manager PIN required.
features.notes: Code complete; no test coverage

features.name: Attach Takeout to Table
features.description: Merge takeout order items into a dine-in table order. Cancel the takeout order.
features.notes: Code complete; no test coverage

features.name: Interactive Floor Plan
features.description: SVG-based table visualization. Color-coded by status (available/occupied/billing/maintenance). Timer display, rejection badges.
features.notes: Status indicators tested; interactive drag not tested

features.name: Active Ticket Queue
features.description: Live queue of active kitchen tickets. Merged by orderId for refills. Timer with urgency levels (normal/warning/critical). Progress bar.
features.notes: Basic queue load and stat counters tested; deep interactions partial

features.name: Mark Items Served / Done
features.description: Individual item marking (pending → served). Bumps ticket to history when all items served.
features.notes: Bumping tested; edge cases (partial serve, reopen) limited

features.name: Ticket Recall (Undo Bump)
features.description: Restore bumped ticket to active queue. Items reset to pending. Recall last ticket shortcut.
features.notes: Recall flow tested via E2E

features.name: Kitchen Item Refuse / Return
features.description: Refuse item with preset reasons (Out of Stock, Equipment Issue, Quality Issue, Wrong Order) or custom reason. Stock restored. Alert sent to POS.
features.notes: Refuse flow tested; POS-side alert acknowledgment partial

features.name: 86 Item (Sold Out Toggle)
features.description: Toggle menu item availability directly from KDS. Un-86 requires confirmation.
features.notes: UI complete; no dedicated test

features.name: Dispatch / Expo Station
features.description: Per-table dispatch cards showing station progress (meat/dishes/sides). Deep links to weigh station and stove. 6 distinct audio tones.
features.notes: Fully implemented with rich audio; no E2E coverage

features.name: Stove Station (Dishes & Drinks)
features.description: Filtered view for dishes/drinks prep. Dine-in and takeout separated. Bump all and individual done buttons.
features.notes: Code complete; no test coverage

features.name: Sides Prep Station
features.description: New table alerts, sides queue, service request alerts. Per-item done buttons.
features.notes: Code complete; no test coverage

features.name: Weigh Station (Meat Scaling)
features.description: Pending meat items grouped by table. Bluetooth scale integration. Yield calculator with manager PIN. Audit logged.
features.notes: Yield calculator complete; Bluetooth integration partial; no E2E

features.name: All Orders View (History & Lookup)
features.description: Aggregate mode via SSE for cross-branch visibility. Status/time filters. Order detail modal with item picker.
features.notes: Feature-rich but no automated tests

features.name: Audio Notifications
features.description: New order ding, void beep (880Hz), 6 dispatch tones (new order, meat update, dishes, sides, request, ready-to-run). Volume slider.
features.notes: Fully implemented with Web Audio API; untestable in headless browser

features.name: KDS History Modal
features.description: Bumped/completed tickets grouped by date. Recall per ticket.
features.notes: Code complete; no test

features.name: Real-Time SSE Push
features.description: Smart debounce push (critical changes immediate, edits 3s). Ring buffer (50 events) for reconnect. Last-Event-ID replay.
features.notes: Architecture is solid; no automated test for SSE behavior

features.name: Multi-Branch SSE Aggregator
features.description: Server-side proxy for owner device to subscribe to all branches. Per-branch error isolation.
features.notes: Complete; requires multi-server E2E which is complex

features.name: Master Inventory View
features.description: Search, filter by status (ok/low/critical), grid/list toggle, protein grouping, 'Needs Attention' banner, per-item health strip.
features.notes: Structural integrity tested; E2E covers list/grid + filters

features.name: All Locations Comparison
features.description: Cross-branch inventory matrix with imbalance detection (>30% difference triggers warning).
features.notes: Code complete; no test for cross-branch comparison

features.name: Receive Delivery
features.description: Item selector, qty/weight input, supplier autocomplete, batch number, expiry date, photo capture, unit cost.
features.notes: Basic receive flow tested; FIFO batch tracking not deeply verified

features.name: FIFO Batch Management
features.description: Per-delivery batch tracking with usedQty. Oldest batches highlighted for use first. Progress ring visualization.
features.notes: Calculation logic complete; no test for FIFO ordering

features.name: Spoilage / Expiry Alerts
features.description: Proactive alerts for deliveries expiring within 3 days. Red (expired) and yellow (expiring soon) badges.
features.notes: getSpoilageAlerts() implemented; no E2E for alert display

features.name: Waste Logging
features.description: 6 reason types with icons. Item selector, qty input. Today's summary with top reason and most wasted item.
features.notes: Basic waste flow tested; summary analytics not verified

features.name: Three-Period Stock Counts (BIR)
features.description: 10 AM / 4 PM / 10 PM count windows. Expected vs counted variance. Deadline urgency display.
features.notes: Count submission tested; variance calculation not deeply verified

features.name: Inter-Location Stock Transfer
features.description: 3-step wizard: select item → choose destination → confirm. Validates available stock and destination tracking.
features.notes: Basic transfer tested; cross-location validation limited

features.name: Manual Stock Adjustment (Add / Deduct / Set)
features.description: Quick adjustment with reason tracking. Audit logged.
features.notes: Code complete; no dedicated test

features.name: 86 Item (Toggle Availability)
features.description: Mark item as sold out from inventory view. Role-gated (kitchen can't 86; warehouse can't 86).
features.notes: Code complete; no test for role gating

features.name: Automatic POS Deduction
features.description: When tracked item ordered, stock deducted automatically. Restored on void/cancel.
features.notes: Negative stock guard tested; basic deduction verified via order flow

features.name: Negative Stock Prevention
features.description: Server-side guard prevents stock from going below zero.
features.notes: Guard activation tested

features.name: Meat Cut Ontology & Yield Tracking
features.description: 30 meat cut nodes, 40 conversion edges with default yields. Editable yield overrides (localStorage).
features.notes: getProteinType() unit tested; ontology graph visualization untested

features.name: X-Reading (BIR)
features.description: BIR X-Reading generation with manager PIN. Immutable record. Live order metrics, VAT breakdown, compact chart.
features.notes: Page load tested; BIR compliance assertions limited

features.name: End of Day / Z-Reading
features.description: EOD summary, open tables guard, cash reconciliation (float + collected − expenses = expected), payment breakdown, utility readings.
features.notes: Page tested; cash variance calculation not deeply verified

features.name: Sales Summary Report
features.description: KPI cards (Gross, Net, VAT, Avg Ticket, Pax) with YoY comparison. Time-series chart (14 days or 8 weeks). Period/granularity filters.
features.notes: Page render tested; calculation assertions limited

features.name: Table Sales Report
features.description: Per-table revenue breakdown.
features.notes: Page loads; data accuracy not verified

features.name: Best Sellers Report
features.description: Top items by revenue/quantity. Meat and addon categories separated.
features.notes: Page loads; ranking accuracy not verified

features.name: Peak Hours Report
features.description: Hourly sales distribution heatmap.
features.notes: Page loads; hourly bucketing not verified

features.name: Stock Variance Report
features.description: Period filter (today/week/month), variance rows (delivered/sold/waste/expected/counted/drift), KPI summary.
features.notes: Page loads; variance math not verified

features.name: Meat Consumption Report
features.description: Tabs: Consumption, Transfers, Conversion. Protein grouping, grand totals, meat ontology visualization.
features.notes: Page loads; deep analysis tabs not verified

features.name: Gross Profit Report
features.description: Gross margin analysis.
features.notes: Page exists; data derivation may be incomplete

features.name: Net Profit Report
features.description: Net margin analysis (revenue minus all expenses).
features.notes: Page exists; expense integration may be incomplete

features.name: Branch Comparison Report
features.description: Multi-location revenue/cost metrics side by side.
features.notes: Page loads; cross-branch aggregation not verified

features.name: Transaction Log
features.description: All transactions with filters.
features.notes: Code exists; no test

features.name: Voids & Discounts Audit
features.description: Voided orders and discount usage audit trail.
features.notes: Code exists; no test

features.name: Expense Logging
features.description: 16 categories in 4 groups (Staff, Procurement, Utilities, Operations). Amount input with meter calculation for utilities. Receipt photo. Paid-by selector.
features.notes: Validation unit tested; CRUD + persistence E2E verified

features.name: Expense Templates
features.description: Saved recurring expense templates (one-time, daily, weekly, monthly). Quick-add from template.
features.notes: Template CRUD implemented; recurrence triggering unclear

features.name: Expenses Daily Report
features.description: Daily expense log with category subtotals and running total.
features.notes: Page exists; no test

features.name: Expenses Monthly Report
features.description: Monthly expense aggregation.
features.notes: Page may be partially implemented

features.name: Utilities Tracking
features.description: Electricity, water, gas meter readings with rate-based cost calculation.
features.notes: Integrated into EOD report; standalone page unclear

features.name: User Management
features.description: User table with role/branch/status. Active/inactive toggle. Add user modal (stub).
features.notes: Table display tested; Add User modal incomplete (steps 2-3 missing)

features.name: Menu Item Editor
features.description: Category filter, add/edit/delete items. Weight-based toggle, price/gram, free toggle, inventory tracking.
features.notes: CRUD flow tested; edge cases (image upload, weight-based) limited

features.name: Activity Logs Viewer
features.description: Filter by action type (7) and branch (3). Color-coded type badges. Live indicator.
features.notes: Duration formatting unit tested; log display E2E tested

features.name: Floor Plan Editor
features.description: Drag, resize, rotate tables. Grid snapping. Chair editor. Save to server. Pan/zoom. Element types: tables, walls, columns, zones, doors.
features.notes: Basic load tested; interactive editing not deeply tested

features.name: Device Tracker & Topology
features.description: Network topology view. Real-time SSE + 30s poll. Status indicators (online/stale/offline). Sync/data mode badges. DB conformity. Admin actions (reset, export).
features.notes: Device registration tested; topology rendering not deeply verified

features.name: Authentication & Login
features.description: Username/password login. 14 test accounts across 3 locations. Role-based routing. Duplicate session detection.
features.notes: RBAC unit tested; login + guards E2E tested

features.name: Role-Based Access Control
features.description: 5 roles (owner/admin/manager/staff/kitchen). Nav access, location locking, admin gating. ROLE_NAV_ACCESS single source of truth.
features.notes: All role constants + deriveSessionState unit tested

features.name: RxDB Database Initialization
features.description: 18 collections. Dexie storage (server) or in-memory (client). Migration strategies. Schema validation. Dev-mode HMR.
features.notes: All 14 schema structures tested; IndexedDB persistence E2E verified

features.name: RxDB Replication (LAN Sync)
features.description: Pull/push replication per collection. Priority sync tiers. Sync activity tracking. Full reset capability.
features.notes: Code robust; no automated test (requires multi-device setup)

features.name: Server-Side Write Guards (12 Guards)
features.description: Duplicate prevention, state machine enforcement, orphan auto-healing, stock negative prevention. 2 layers (replication + write API).
features.notes: Several guards tested via E2E; full guard matrix not covered

features.name: Connection Status Monitor
features.description: Online/offline detection. Floating status pill. DB health banner.
features.notes: Code complete; no test (hard to simulate offline in E2E)

features.name: Adaptive Data Mode
features.description: 4 modes: full-rxdb, selective-rxdb, sse-only, api-fetch. Based on device identity + role. Cached in sessionStorage.
features.notes: Resolution logic complete; no test

features.name: Audit Log System
features.description: 17+ action wrappers (tableOpened, itemCharged, orderVoided, etc.). RxDB-backed persistent log. Fire-and-forget writes.
features.notes: Duration formatting tested; log visibility in admin E2E tested

features.name: Guard Event Tracking
features.description: Client-side guard recording. FIFO buffer (50 events). Auto-seen after 60s. Writes to audit log.
features.notes: Code complete; no dedicated test

features.name: Device Identity & Heartbeat
features.description: Device registration, hostname/IP resolution, stale pruning (>24h), rename, server detection.
features.notes: Code complete; tested indirectly via admin-devices E2E

features.name: Server Restart Recovery
features.description: Blocks UI after server reset with progress bar + log streaming. Sync gate for client devices (8s timeout).
features.notes: Code complete; no test (requires server restart simulation)

features.name: PWA Install Prompt
features.description: Android WebAPP install prompt + iOS custom instructions on login page.
features.notes: UI complete; no test

features.name: Bluetooth Scale Integration
features.description: Web Bluetooth GATT pairing for meat weighing. Weight reading in grams. Reconnection handling.
features.notes: Pairing UI tested; actual device I/O requires hardware

criticalGaps: Stock FIFO batch tracking — no test
